en: John, I am a ridiculous man, redeemed only by the warmth and constancy of your friendship.
ko: 존, 나는 우스꽝스러운 사람이야. 오직 당신의 따뜻함과 한결같음으로 구원받은

en: So if I didn't understand I was being asked to be best man, it is because I never expected
to be anybody's best friend, and certainly not the best friend of the bravest and kindest
and wisest human being I have ever had the good fortune of knowing.
So know this, today you sit between the woman you have made your wife and the man you have
saved, in short the two people who love you most in all this world, and I know I speak
for Mary as well when I say we will never let you down and we have a lifetime ahead to prove that.
There are mysteries worth solving and stories worth telling.
This blog is the story of two men and their frankly ridiculous adventures, but from now
on there is a new story, a bigger adventure, Mary and John.
